prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约3074→2638→2373→1874→1825，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约1249名；2025年基准约1825名，较2024年 仅前移49名，升势明显放缓；本省物理类计划2021年327人、2022年331人、2023年323人、2024年332人、2025年332人；2026年计划342人，较2025年扩招 10人（+3.0%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与该校工科试验班高度匹配，专业热度对报考有正向拉动；广东省2026年物 理类考生约456000人，较2025年增加约15792人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于深圳市，属本省办学，对广东考生 有天然地域吸引力；本地招生占比高，2025年物理类计划332人占全省物理类考生约0.075%，2026年扩至342人，本省考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移 但2025年升势明显放缓、2026年小幅扩招（+3.0%）、本省物理类考生增加（+3.6%）、计算机/电子信息等专业持续高热、学校声誉平稳且抖音热度高，预计2026年竞争略有加剧 但位次基本稳定在2025年水平附近；预测最低位次约1865名，区间1810–1920名。

- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信拔尖班）（2024年曾设，第1年校本部后3年深圳）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3074 → 2638 → 2373 → 1874 → 1825, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 1249 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1825, only 49 places ahead of 2024, indicating a significant slowdown in the upward trend; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 327 in 2021, 331 in 2022, 323 in 2023, 332 in 2024, and 332 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 342, an increase of 10 students (+3.0%) compared to 2025, with a slight expansion slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Harbin Institute of Technology's main campus ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking (steadily rising in recent years); the Shenzhen campus shares the main campus's academic strength and brand, and is located in Shenzhen, with significant geographical advantages; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but it returned to stability in 2025; Harbin Institute of Technology's main campus has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, etc.; the Shenzhen campus's enrollment majors (Computer and Electronic Communication, Autonomous Intelligence, etc.) correspond to A-level disciplines such as Computer Science, Communication, Automation, and Electrical Engineering, with strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching the university's Engineering Experimental Classes, with major popularity positively driving applications; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, with the expansion of examinees intensifying competition; the university is located in Shenzhen, within the province, naturally attracting Guangdong examinees; the local enrollment proportion is high, with the 2025 Physics Category plan of 332 students accounting for about 0.075% of the province's Physics Category examinees, expanding to 342 in 2026, with strong willingness among provincial examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advance in historical rankings but a significant slowdown in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3.0%), an increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (+3.6%), sustained high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information majors, stable school reputation, and high Douyin popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026 but rankings will remain basically stable around the 2025 level; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1865, with a range of 1810–1920.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication Honors Class) (offered in 2024, 1st year at main campus, then 3 years at Shenzhen).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Robotics Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Automation and Electrical Engineering) (offered in 2023).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment) (offered in 2023–2024, including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Architecture Class (Smart Human Settlement) (History Category enrollment, Physics Category enrolled in 2021–2022).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1810–1920, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 (Autonomous Intelligence/Automation) as the main choice, Tier 1 (Future Information/Computer and Electronic Communication) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1810), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1920), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1748 → 1678 → 1626 → 1921 → 1682, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, it notably shifted back to 1921, then rebounded to 1682 in 2025; the 2025 baseline is about 1682. Provincial History Category enrollment plans: 23 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 49, a substantial increase of 34 students (+226.7%) compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; HIT main campus ranks approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, and the Shenzhen campus shares the brand and academic strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with overall high attention; History Category has few majors (only Economics and Management Pilot Class), and the expansion may attract more candidates; HIT main campus has Management Science and Engineering rated A, Business Administration rated A-, etc., corresponding to History Category majors (Economics and Management Pilot Class/Accounting); strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics/Management/Accounting majors have mixed and wait-and-see popularity, overall stable; Guangdong Province in 2026 has approximately 326,200 History Category candidates, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) from 2025, significantly increasing competition; the university is located in Shenzhen, a provincial institution, with strong regional appeal to Guangdong History Category candidates; the 2026 History Category plan expands from 15 to 49, greatly increasing provincial enrollment slots.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings (shifted back to 1921 in 2024), the substantial expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (+226.7%), the increase in provincial History Category candidates (+11.6%), and the stable popularity of Economics and Management majors, the expansion significantly pulls rankings downward, but the increase in candidate numbers partially offsets the expansion effect; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025, predicted to be around 1700, with a range of 1650–1750.

- Economics Class (Experimental Class) (enrolled in 2021).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Economics and Management Pilot Class (includes Accounting, enrolling in 2025).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1650–1750, History Category has few majors (only Economics and Management Pilot Class with 49 slots in 2026), so it is recommended to prioritize the Economics and Management Pilot Class. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1650), you can apply boldly; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>1750), be cautious and consider this university as a reach choice.
